description: This Java source file defines the SupportingDocument entity class used for persisting metadata about user-uploaded supporting documents in a Spring Boot application with JPA. It includes fields such as id, userId, file details, checksum, storage key, and metadata, along with getter and setter methods.

classes.name: SupportingDocument
classes.description: Entity class representing metadata for a supporting document stored in the system.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID identifier of the supporting document.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID identifier for the supporting document.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the associated user.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with the document.

methods.name: getLoanDraftId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the associated loan draft, if any.

methods.name: setLoanDraftId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the related loan draft.

methods.name: getOriginalFilename
methods.description: Returns the original filename of the uploaded document.

methods.name: setOriginalFilename
methods.description: Sets the original filename of the document.

methods.name: getContentType
methods.description: Returns the MIME content type of the document.

methods.name: setContentType
methods.description: Sets the MIME content type of the document.

methods.name: getSizeBytes
methods.description: Returns the size of the document in bytes.

methods.name: setSizeBytes
methods.description: Sets the size of the document in bytes.

methods.name: getSha256Hex
methods.description: Returns the SHA-256 hexadecimal digest of the file.

methods.name: setSha256Hex
methods.description: Sets the SHA-256 hexadecimal digest.

methods.name: getStorageKey
methods.description: Returns the storage key referencing the file in storage.

methods.name: setStorageKey
methods.description: Sets the storage key for the stored file.

methods.name: getMetadata
methods.description: Returns JSON metadata associated with the document.

methods.name: setMetadata
methods.description: Sets the JSON metadata.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the record was created.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp of the record.
